text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and I head to the shopping district to
buy some equipment one day after training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What's going on over there?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So, it's a raffle. Come to think of it, didn't you get
a ticket earlier?
choice_data_list: Want to give it a go?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well there's no point in not using it, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hand it over.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My sister always says that I'm good at turning the
tumbler. Just watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand the raffle ticket to a strangely confidant
Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steps up boldly and spins the lever of the
raffle machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh... the grand prize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're a little too happy. You look just like
my sister.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Every time I won a prize, she would clap her
hands and run up to get it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But that's ancient history. Anyway, I'll give you
the prize this time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why not? You're the one who got the ticket to
play in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All I did was spin the lever. If anyone deserves the
prize, it's you.
choice_data_list: But you went to all the trouble...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hah. You're taking this too seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll use it when I decide the time is right.
Okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian ends up taking the ticket for
the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm... Another delicious-looking prize.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Oho, you've got a good eye! Actually, the retail value of this hamburger steak is... mumble, mumble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What?! Are you insane, giving away something
this extravagant as a raffle prize?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I recommend you eat it soon. All food is best
when it's fresh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's hurry back and get cooking, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Who knew you could get meat like this from a
raffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and I head back to the school faster
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, we won something..

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Not bad, getting second prize and all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Come on, don't praise me over something like
this. It's embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I said cut it out already. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian splits the carrots with me, looking
slightly embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Third place.
choice_data_list: Winning anything at all is still lucky!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess so. Raffles are like that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
At least the prize is a carrot. It's good luck
getting something I can eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian takes the prize. Although she's not a
fan of vegetables, it seems that carrots are an
exception.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I lost?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
True. Playing a raffle you can't lose would be
boring.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Everything happens by chance. Not knowing what
will happen is exactly what makes it interesting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Although, winning still would've been nicer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tail drops dejectedly and doesn't perk up
again for a while after.
